daikin1:
Building A Mode: Cool (Summer) - Mon. 16:00–19:30 for 73 (Faith Bible Institute) - Mon. 16:00–21:00 for 73 (Faith Bible Institute) - Tue. 15:00–18:30 for 73 (Choir Practices) - Thu. 7:00–15:10 for 73 (Classical Conversations) - Thu. 16:30–19:40 for 73 (Awana) - Fri. 15:00–20:00 for 73 (Ohana Study) - Sun. 8:30–12:40 for 73 (Church) - Sun. 15:00–18:30 for 73 (Trek)
Mode: Heat (Winter) - Mon. 16:00–19:30 for 68 (Faith Bible Institute) - Tue. 14:30–18:30 for 68 (Choir Practices) - Wed. 16:30-21:00 (Faith Bible Institute) - Thu. 6:00–15:10 for 68 (Classical Conversations) - Thu. 17:00–19:40 for 68 (Awana) - Fri. 15:30–20:00 for 68 (Ohana Study) - Sun. 5:30–12:40 for 68 (Church) [Brad had me change 6:30 to 5:30 for coldest season] - Sun. 15:30–18:30 for 68 (Trek)
